completion: A versioned static Python call-reference artifact records call sites, enclosing caller symbols, callee expressions, source ranges and resolution state.
Read-only MCP tools find_references and get_callers return bounded exact-first results with live freshness attached.
Ambiguous or dynamic calls remain explicit and are never promoted to proven runtime reachability.
Focused, full-suite and live-bundle validation pass on the exact merged head.
goal: Extend RepoBrief from exact symbol-definition lookup to deterministic, bounded Python reference and caller navigation without claiming a complete runtime call graph or moving mutation authority into RepoBrief.
title: RepoBrief bounded Symbol-Call-Graph navigation
